name: White Sunfish
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>白曼波</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ホワイト・マンボウ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower Fish monster in your GY with the same name as a card you control; Special Summon this card, and if you do, Special Summon that monster. You can only use this effect of "White Sunfish" once per turn. If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can treat it as a Tuner this turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower Fish monster in your GY with the same name as a card you control; Special Summon this card, and if you do, Special Summon that monster. You can only use this effect of "White Sunfish" once per turn. If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can treat it as a Tuner this turn.
eff: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower Fish monster in your GY with the same name as a card you control; Special Summon this card, and if you do, Special Summon that monster. You can only use this effect of "White Sunfish" once per turn. If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can treat it as a Tuner this turn.

stat_change: Treats itself as a Tuner monster
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
